§2Consider installing a Power Saving upgrade above level 2 on the electrolysis machine as it will significantly reduce the power consumption with only a minimal speed penalty.
The §3High-Power Steam Condenser§r is the a steam condenser which runs on electricity. It processes up to 60 mB/t of §bLow-Pressure Steam§r.

The §3Leviathan Steam Turbine§r is a massive turbine capable of processing gargantuan amounts of §bSteam§r at once, only hindered by the fluid system's transfer rate. It is significantly more powerful than even the §3Industrial Steam Turbine§r in terms of raw steam processing power. This turbine runs on §e85%§r Efficiency, so it is recommended that only 1-2 are used for very large reactors.

The §3Cyclotron§r is a machine that bombards element powders with element boxes to get heavier elements. Operating the machine will consume§e 20MHE/s§r.

It can also create §bAntimatter§r as a byproduct for certain operations, which makes it a reliable but expensive method of large-scale advanced material production.

§2Consider installing the highest level of Power Saving and Speed upgrades to reduce both recipe time and power consumption.§r
Particles are important items required to create exotic materials which are needed for most of the endgame content.

§6Euphemium§r is a fictional material which serves as one of the mod's most endgame materials. It's extremely expensive to produce in large amounts and you will need great advancement through the mod to use it effectively.

§6Dineutronium§r is the mod's (almost) ultimate material. It's a final tier material and is a higher tier than even §6Euphemium§r. It is very difficult to produce and it's used to make the most absurd and broken items this mod has. The only material that is more difficult to make, would be §6Osmiridium§r.

The §c§r§4§r§6Digamma Particle§r is created by colliding a §6Sparkticle Capsule§r with a §6Higgs Boson Capsule§r in a §3Particle Accelerator§r. Making it in the particle accelerator will require §6Chlorophyte Coils§r and momentum of 70,000.

The digamma particle emits a different kind of radiation, §4DRX§r, which currently can only be countered by the use of digamma medication, most notably §6Enteramine Pills§r, which provide full immunity against DRX for 10 minutes. After the §3DFC§r, Fau armor can be crafted which provides full resistance against DRX.
The§3 Murky Anvil§r is the ultimate version of the §3Anvil§r, having all recipes unlocked.
The §6Spark Laser Crystal§r unlocks new recipes, most importantly it is used to create §6Osmiridium§r.

The §6Book of Boxcars§r is an item which allows the crafting of many special items. The book can be found inside §eMeteorite Dungeons§r found randomly in the wilderness, indicated by either skulls on the ground of a black pillar, or in §eRed Rooms§r.

The §6Digamma Laser Crystal§r is the fastest and final laser crystal which can be used in a SILEX.

§2If the laser touches any block, the surrounding area will be atomized.
An upgraded version of the §3Anvil§r, [T7], which unlocks additional recipes.
The §6Spark Singularity§r is a singularity made from combining all the types of singularities with §6Dineutronium§r.
The §3FenSU§r is the ultimate energy storage block, being able to unlimited amounts of energy.

§6Gerald the Construction Android§r is the most powerful weapon in the mod. Using this has the side effect of setting the world on fire but also getting tektite, which contains §6Osmiridium§r.

Gerald is the hardest recipe of the mod requiring hundreds of thousands of items, mainly circuit related.

Vast quantities of §6Bismuth§r, §6Tantalum§r and §6Silicon§r are needed, so dont hold back on bedrock ore processing and parallelisation of many processes. If you havent already used §dAE2§r, it is highly recommended at this stage of the game.

Launching Gerald will result in a global firestorm that will decimate all life, including all trees and grass. Make sure to keep a backup of your world before launching him. Gerald can also be launched in the §eNether§r or §eEnd§r.

§2Blueprints for Gerald and the Orbital Module can be found in structures or purchased from Bobmazon.
§6Osmiridium§r is the second most expensive material and is used primarely in the §3DFC§r.
The §6Yharonite Billet§r is created in a tungsten crate that has §6Polonium Billets§r in it while being shot from a §3DFC Emitter§r. This is the final material obtained in the mod.
The §6Crucible§r is a weapon that deals extreme amount of damage. It can be recharged inside a Tungsten Crate shot by a §3DFC Emitter§r.
The §6Schrabidium Hammer§r is the most powerful weapon in the mod, being able to one-shot everything.

§bHigh-Performance Solvent§r is a solvent which is used in an §3Ore Acidizer§r to further increase the products of bedrock ores, aswell as other recipes. It can be created from §bReformate Gas§r, from a §3Vacuum Refinery§r, and §bChlorine§r in an §3Industrial Mixer§r or be obtained from an §3RBMK§r Irradiation Channel.

To transport High-Performance Solvent by hand, a §6Hazardous Material Tank§r is needed.

§2High-Performance Solvent made from an RBMK irradiation channel requires an ore acidizer.

The §3Radiation-Powered Engine§r turns nuclear waste into decayed waste while also making energy in the process and giving guaranteed consistent decay times.

§2Blueprints can be found in structures or purchased from Bobmazon.

§6Weapon steel§r is a steel alloy made by further refining steel in a §3Rotary Furnace§r. As its name implies, it is used in the crafting of weapons and ammunition. It is the next tier of weapons grade alloy after §6Gunmetal§r.

The §3Teleporter§r can be used to teleport players, and entities in general, to a specific location.

Right-click a block with the §6Telelinker§r to set the desired exit position, then shift-click the teleporter with the telelinker to configure the teleporter.

§2The teleporter is a one way trip so it is advised that multiple are made.

§6§3Redstone-Over Radio§r in combination with a §3Redstone Fluid Valve§r can be used to detect when a tank is starting to fill up, and release the insides. This is useful for having buffers without having all the fluids being wasted.

§2Here is an exmaple of a tank that will only output fluid once its full:§r

Firstly, place a §6ROR Transmitter§r on one port of the tank, provide an ID and enable Polling.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Fluid1.png[/img]

After that, place a §6ROR Logic Receiver§r next to the fluid valve and input the desired settings. Make sure that your signal is >= of your desired buffer. One redstone level equals to 16k mb.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Fluid2.png[/img]

A §3Fluid Control Pump§r can also be used to limit throughput of fluids and to also add priorities.

The §3Precision Assembler§r is a machine which can produce §6Blueprints§r. Due to the recipes having a low success rate, automation of the ingredients is recommended.

Pufferfish can be obtained from throwing §6Fishing Dynamite§r in water.

The §6Powered Drill§r is a modular mining device which can make resourse gathering and excavation much faster than normal pickaxes. 

Various modifications can be attached in the §3Weapon Modification Table§r, such as new drillbits for a larger mining radious or even new engines, which let it run on electricity.

The §3Mining Laser§r is a laser drill which can be used to quickly dig large areas. It has a §e100MHE§r internal power buffer and a 64,000mB internal §bCrude Oil§r buffer. Its default radius is 3, which can be increased by the use of an effectiveness upgrade. It can also be equiped with various upgrades to unlock new functions such as shredding or voiding.
§6Microchips§r are one of the most important components of future circuits and will be used in bulk throughout progression.
The §6Jetpack§r can be used to travel upwards. It can be upgraded to unlock additional abilities, and can be equiped as an armor modification.

§6Balefire§r is an extremely radioactive substance which can be used to make powerful fuels for the §3RBMK§r, aswell as §bBF Rocket Fuel§r for power production. High radiation resistant equipment is needed to hold the item. §6Thermonuclear Ashes§r can be produced sustainably as a byproduct from §bAntimatter - BF Rocket Fuel§r.

The High-Tech Bomb Defusing Device can extract balefire shards from duds.

§7§6Bauxide§r and §6Cryolite§r from the light metal line of Bedrock Ore Processing can be further processed to obtain §6Aluminium§r, with additional byproducts of §6Iron§r, §6Titanium§r and §bMercury§r.

§6Uranium-238§r is the most common uranium isotope in the game. 

This material has many uses, some of which are: §6Ferrouranium§r, MOX fuel, depleted uranium ammunition, absorber Pellets for the §3Watz§r powerplant and can also be turned into §6Schrabidium§r later on in the §3Exposure Chamber§r.
§6Technetium-99§r is a common waste product from the fission of §6Uranium§r and §6Plutonium§r. It is mainly used in making §6Technetium Steel§r and §dAE2 Storage Components§r.

The §6Starmetal Pickaxe§r is used as a crafting component for the §6Molten§r and §6Bismuth Pickaxes§r, both being unbreakable and having a lot of abilities. Additionally, both can be used to mine §eDepth Rock§r.

The §3Spent Fuel Pool Drum§r is used to cool down hot nuclear fuel rods for the §3RBMK§r, §3ZIRNOX§r and §3PWR§r. It has 12 slots.

The drum needs to have atleast one of its sides touching §bWater§r to work. The more sides that have water the faster the fuels inside will cool down.

The §6Red Key§r is able to open any container that requires a regular key, regardless of the pin configuration of the lock, and it is one of the only two keys capable of opening the keyhole found on strange stone, in order to open a §eRed Room§r. The key has no durability, and can be reused indefinitely.
With the §3Nuclear Waste Disposal Drum§r to decay waste and a §3SILEX§r, §3RBMK§r nuclear fuels can be processed into many new materials.

The §3PUREX§r is a machine that can reprocess depleted nuclear fuel into various materials. Most recipes require both §bNitric Acid§r and §bKerosene§r to function.

§6Schrabidium§r can also be extracted from certain recipes, which require §bSchrabidic Acid§r. The schrabidium extracted yields double the schrabidium used to make the acid.

The §3Nuclear Waste Disposal Drum§r is used to decay §3RBMK§r nuclear waste. The decayed nuclear waste can then be used with a §3FEL§r and §3SILEX§r to obtain some rare elements, such as §6Bismuth§r.

§2The drum also emmits radiation when theres fuel inside it.
With the §3Spent Fuel Pool Drum§r to cool down §3ZIRNOX§r or §3PWR§r depleted nuclear fuel and the §3PUREX§r to further process them, many new materials are now available.

With access to §6Tantalum§r for §6Control Units§r and fissile matterials, it is possible to assemble a nuclear bomb. To detonate the bomb one can use a detonator or a redstone signal.

A nuclear explosion will transform ores into more valuable ones, such as §6Coal§r to §6Diamonds§r or §6Uranium§r to §6Schrabidium§r. Be prepared with radiation resistant armor before venturing into the crater.

Make sure to stand behind some strong cover if you wish to see the explosion from close by.

§2This quest serves as a list of components needed for various bombs. Some of these components can be mounted onto rockets that will carry the payload over large distances.

The §3Chemical Factory§r is a large version of the §3Chemical Plant§r, capable of performing 4 recipes in parallel. It has double the speed of the chemical plant but consumes twice as much power. Additionally, it consumes §bWater§r as a coolant, and produces §bLow-Pressure Steam§r, so a closed water cycle is recommended.

The §3Assembly Factory§r is a large version of the §3Assembly Machine§r, capable of performing 4 recipes in parallel. It functions the same as the chemical factory.
§bHigh-Performance Solvent§r is the best tier of solvent which can be used in bedrock ore processing, yielding many rare materials such as§6 Bismuth§r and §6Technetium-99§r.

The §4§3Heat Exchanging Heater§r is used to cool down coolants used in reactors while also genearting §eTU§r. A §3Boiler§r can be placed ontop of it to heat up other fluids, such as §bSteam§r, to be used in §3Steam Turbines§r.

The §3Gas Centrifuge§r is used to centrifuge §bUranium/Plutonium Hexafluoride§r to obtain enriched fuel for bombs and reactor fuel.

Two gas centrifuges in a row will yield §6Uranium-238§r and §6Uranium Fuel§r used in reactors. The uranium hexafluoride processing line does not consume the §6Sulfur§r and §6Fluorite§r, so loops are recommended.

The §6Gas Centrifuge Overclocking Upgrade§r is needed to obtain §6Uranium-235§r. Four gas centrifuges will have to be placed in a row and the upgrade on the last of them to obtain uranium-235 nuggets.

[F1] For more information.

The §3Fusion Reactor Boiler§r is simplest method of extracting power from a fusion reactor, outputting §bSuper Dense Steam§r to be run through normal turbines.

Due to using plasma energy, both the MHDT and the boiler are affected by port sharing rules, meaning that having multiple connected MHTDs, or boilers, decreases the amount of energy each turbine gets, but overall increases the total amount of extracted from the torus.
With fissile materials obtained from either §3Gas Centrifuges§r or nuclear fuel processing, nuclear bombs are made available.

The §3Chicago Pile§r is a crude early-game breeding reactor meant to produce §6Plutonium§r for use as reactor fuel.

A pile is composed of drilled §6Graphite§r which can hold a variety of items in it, including radioisotope rods (§6Uranium§r, §6Radium§r, §6Plutonium§r), §6Lithium rods§r, and control rods. It does not behave as a unified single block, instead each individual piece of drilled graphite interacts with each other piece in a unique way depending on the rod it contains.

After sufficient flux, the uranium rods in the Chicago Pile will transmute into plutonium rods that can be processed in an anvil into §6Reactor Grade Plutonium§r which can be used in other reactors such as the §3ZIRNOX§r and §3RBMK§r.

The chicago pile requires a significant amount of graphite blocks, which once placed can be drilled into with the hand drill to place any rod into. 

The §6Hand Drill§r can be used to drill holes into the graphite or take core samples of the uranium fuel to determine heat, depletion, and neutron flux. §6Screwdrivers§r are used to extract rods.

The Quest asks for a 3x3 Chicago Pile (without the corners) with a §6Ra226Be§r Rod in the center surrounded by Uranium Rods.

§6Cadmium§r is a material needed to make §6Cadmium Stee§rl, which is a substitute of §6Technetium Steel§r.

Cadmium can be obtained by smelting cadmium powder, which can be obtained acidizing 10 §6Mustard Willow leaves§r with 250mB of §bHigh-Perfomance Solvent§r in the §3Ore Acidizer§r.

The mustard willow is a plant that can be found near §eBedrock Oil Deposits§r. When it's fully matured, the main item can be obtained, that being the mustard willow leaf.

§6Arsenic§r is a substitute of §6Bismuth§r which can be made from acidizing §6Oily Dirt§r, found near §ebedrock oil deposits§r or from the environmental damage the §3Fracking Tower§r does, with §bHigh-Performance Solvent§r.

The §3Fusion Reactor Coupler§r turns outgoing plasma energy from a torus into usable §eKyE§r which can then be used to power another torus. Some fuel combinations require this, as the minimum §eKyE§r energy needed to ignite the plasma exceeds what four §3Klystrons§r could deliver.

The §3Fusion Reactor Breeding Chamber§r uses neutron flux from a torus to in order to process materials. It can perform any recipe from an §3RBMK irradiation channel§r, with some additional recipes aswell. The neutron flux is not affected by port sharing rules, and the output level is the same on any side.

The §3Fusion Reactor Collection Chamber§r increases the byproduct production rate by §e50%§r.
§6Welded Osmiridium Plates§r cost 120 Billion HE to produce, so good energy generation and storage infrastructure is needed.

The Martian Invasion Ship is a late-game boss which is killed to get the §6UFO Coin§r, used in crafting Gerald.

This quest provides an alternative way of obtaining the coin.

§2This quest can be repeated.

The §3Particle Accelerator§r is a highly modular machine that uses high strength superconducting magnets to accelerate particles to relativistic speeds in order to collide them together.

Due to the complex and expansive nature of the particle accelerator, it is highly recommend that the wiki is checked out as it provides more information.

[url]https://nucleartech.wiki/wiki/Particle_Accelerator[/url]

§2This quest demands the most essential parts of the particle accelerator, and does not represent the amount needed for it to function.

§3Magnetohydrodynamic Turbines§r are advanced components of the fusion reactor that make electricity out of the plasma energy directly without needing additional turbines. While more expensive and requiring §bPerfluoromethyl§r cooling, they have a §e+35%§r convertion bonus from §eTU§r to §eHE§r. In addition, the MDH turbine requires a minimum input of
§e5MTU/t§r of plasma energy to operate normally, otherwise efficiency will be halved.
The §3ICF Laser Turbocharger§r can be placed next to §3ICF Laser Capacitors§r to increase the laser's power by a substantial amount, allowing for the §3ICF§r to run higher grade fuels.
§2This quest provides an optional retrieval task for a small laser capable of running Helium-4 - Hydrogen Fuel at 15MHE.

The §3ICF§r can process different combinations of fuels at different laser power levels. A cheap and renewable fuel that can be used to gather the §bStellar Flux§r needed for §6Gerald§r and make decent power is §bHelium-4 - Hydrogen§r.

Applying a Muon Particle to a fuel pellet will decrease the power that is needed to run it.

Balls-O-Tron is the second boss of §dNTM§r. It can be summoned by interracting the mechanist's circle, found in the §eEnargite Temple§r which spawns in jungles, with a §6Silver Key§r, made using the Maskman Coin, or from crafting the Balls-O-Tron spawn item.

Due to the outdated nature of the bosses, aswell as the RNG needed to obtain some of the items, this quest provides an alternative way of obtaining the Balls-O-Tron coin.

§2This quest can be repeated.

§6Welcome to NuclearCraft!§f  
This mod focuses on §6large-scale power generation§f through §bNuclear Fission§f and §bNuclear Fusion§f.

§eThe most challenging aspect§f is producing the required §6nuclear fuels and isotopes§f. While §bJEI§f documents the full process, many materials involve §emulti-step production chains§f that must be followed carefully.

§8Some quest descriptions are adapted from the Multiblock Madness modpack.§f

§6Nuclear Furnace§f uses §bUranium§f or §bThorium Ingots§f as fuel to §6rapidly smelt items§f. These fuels burn §asignificantly faster§f than conventional sources, making the furnace ideal for §ehigh-throughput smelting§f at the cost of §cradioactive materials§f.

§6Speed Upgrade§f reduces the §6processing time§f of machines by making them run faster, at the cost of §cincreased power consumption§f.

§4Note§f: §eSome machines will reset their progress§f if they §crun out of power§f mid-operation, making stable energy supply important when using Speed Upgrades.

§6Energy Upgrade§f lowers the §6energy cost§f required per operation, helping machines §arun more efficiently§f. However, the number of Energy Upgrades §ccannot exceed§f the number of §bSpeed Upgrades§f installed.

§eUsing Energy Upgrades§f makes it §aeasier to keep machines running continuously§f, especially in high-throughput setups.

§eBoth upgrades§f are crafted using §6Research Points§f, which are obtained from the §bResearcher multiblock§f.

§6Li-Ion Cell§f is a §6portable energy storage item§f capable of storing up to §6800 kRF§f.

§eThe cell can be §acharged directly§f by placing it inside an §bHBM Energy Storage Block§f, allowing seamless integration between §bRF-based systems§f and HBM power infrastructure.

§6Melter§f is a §6processing machine§f used to §6convert solid items§f such as §bingots, dusts, or components§f into their §bmolten liquid forms§f.

§eThe Melter§f serves as the §eentry point§f for molten processing chains, supplying §bmolten materials§f to machines like the §bFluid Mixer§f for alloying or directly to the §bIngot Former§f for solidification.

§eThis machine§f replaces traditionalcrucible-based melting in §6advanced metallurgy§f, enabling §aprecise, fully automated§f liquid-based production systems essential for late-game NuclearCraft setups.

§eThis machine§f is a §6core component§f of molten liquid processing setups, typically operating alongside the §bMelter§f and §bIngot Former§f to enable §afully automated alloy and compound production§f.

§6RF to HE conversion§f is now §aseamless§f. You can directly connect §bThermal Dynamics power cables§f to an §bHBM Energy Storage Block§f to convert and distribute power.

§eIn practice§f, the Pressurizer has §climited applications§f outside of §bgem production§f from powdered materials, as plates production is covered by HBM §banvils.§f These gems are §6important components§f in a variety of §bNuclearCraft-related recipes§f, making the machine §asituational but necessary§f for specific progression paths.

You can use this feature to charge your machines using a Lithium Ion Cell for now, until you get a voltaic pile.
